    comp: state migrated: 2 resources, 1 removed from state
    <{%fg 3%}>warning: urn:pulumi:test::test::my:module:Comp$pkgA:m:typA::childB is no longer managed by Pulumi (the resource is NOT deleted)<{%reset%}>

<{%reset%}>    [id=1]
